Projects.page_description: List of my projects, from school to commercial. Most of them are open source and can be found on my GitHub.
Projects.seo_description: A showcase of projects by Miroslav Novotny. Featuring work in Next.js, Rust, and Java, including open-source tools and SaaS platforms.
Projects.title: Projects

expertov.title: Expertov
expertov.description: Production SaaS platform developed based on client requirements developed in Next.js using Trpc, Drizzle ORM, PostgreSQL and Redis.

vyhledavac-adres.title: RÚIAN Address Search
vyhledavac-adres.description: Address search engine with Full-text indexing. Developed in Rust using WebAssembly and MariaDB database system.

impostor.title: Simple Impostor Game
impostor.description: Modern PWA implementation of the party game. Written in React with Tailwind CSS, optimized for mobile devices with offline support.

fractal.title: Fractal Generator
fractal.description: Project from the Programming in Rust course for rendering the mathematical Barnsley fern with zoom functionality.

tree.title: Colorful Tree Utility
tree.description: Visually enhanced version of Unix utilities tree in C with support for colors and icons.

flashscore.title: Flashscore Scraper microservice
flashscore.description: Fork of a scraper for obtaining data from the Flashscore website - optimized for faster data acquisition and implemented as a microservice.
